messages.text: yooo just dropped $$ on a set of Boba U4Ts (yes named after the cat lol). holy thock incoming. unboxing stream when they land 📦
hey pushed the bot update to the server — added the !meetup command + role pings. lmk if it breaks, I MIGHT have hardcoded the token again 😅 will move it to env later i swear
Hi! Confirming scope for the landing page: hero, pricing grid, contact form, mobile responsive. Deadline still Friday EOD?
Dropped the API config in the shared Drive doc (Stripe + Mailchimp keys are in there). Should be everything you need to wire up the form.
man this Friday deadline is killing me lol. been heads down since noon, cats are judging me. Pixel literally sitting on the keyboard rn
Deploying now — take a look at the staging link when you get a sec and let me know if the form submits okay 🙏
who's coming to the meetup Sat?? doing it at the usual brewery on Rainey ~2pm. bringing the new build + the lube station. RSVP so I know how many keycaps to haul
for sat — can you grab the folding tables? I'll bring the mats + switches. parking is rough so come early. also remind me to NOT talk for 40 min about my printer this time
ok late night brain dump: next build is a 65% with a brass plate, gonna 3D print a custom case for it and document the whole thing. already named the project 'pixel65'. updates incoming all week 🔧
meetup pics 📸 great turnout!! that's my desk setup in the back, Alex's split board, and yes someone snuck a cat photo of Boba onto the projector. same time next month?
yo anyone else in on the GMK Olive group buy?? deadline's tomorrow and i keep telling myself i don't need a 4th set lol. someone talk me out of it (or into it, im weak)
hey did you ever merge that PR for the discord bot? the role-assign thing is still broken on the server, kept poking at it tonight but my brain's fried. lmk and i'll redeploy
FIXED IT FINALLY. dropped the bed temp 5C, slowed first layer to 20mm/s and boom — perfect adhesion. been fighting this elephant's foot for two weeks. macro shot attached, look at that squish 😭

ok 2:30am brain dump for whoever's awake: PLA+ at 215/60, 0.12 layer, 40% gyroid, and i swear it only dials in once my apartment hits like 74F. AC's been off all week so the print room's a sauna but the parts are flawless. trade-offs lol

pushed the staging build — lmk if the env vars look right on your end? i think i got the new API key wired into the config but double check the Stripe one, i may have left the old value commented in there somewhere
the switch haul came in 🥵 70x Gateron oil kings + a tin of 205g0 for the stabs. @alextx_makes look what you made me do. lubing station is officially taking over the kitchen table

PR's merged, redeployed the bot, roles are assigning again. we good now lol. honestly half the bug was me leaving a stale token in the .env, classic. anyway crisis over, owe you a beer at the next meetup
slot's locked in, im officially in on the group buy. we ride at dawn boys 🫡 already planning where this set goes even though i have zero free boards. send help

hey @newbie don't sweat the stab rattle, super common. quick rundown: clip the feet flush, holee mod with a bandaid strip, then a thin coat of dielectric grease on the wire ends NOT the housing. balance the board on a box so the switches hang free when you test. 90% of rattle is dry wire contact. ping me if it's still ticking after
hey ma quick q — Boba hasn't touched his food since last night and he's just kind of hiding under the bed. kinda worried. is that the thing you said the old cat used to do or am i overthinking it
might be quiet tonight, one of the cats is sick and not eating so im keeping an eye on him. gonna skip the build stream. don't let them sell out my GMK slot while im gone 😅

heads up im gonna be slow today — one of my cats had a vet emergency this morning so im in the waiting room. so sorry, i'll have the staging fixes to you by tonight latest. ping me if anything's urgent and i'll jump on

update: just a mild stomach thing, vet says he's ok, gave him some fluids and an anti-nausea shot. eating a little now. $$$ ouch though, $340 to be told my cat ate something dumb 🙃 but he's fine, that's what matters

crisis averted — Boba's eating again and back to knocking stuff off my desk, so we're officially out of the woods 🎉 thanks for the good vibes. back to builds soon, lubing those oil kings this weekend for real this time
yo my switches are STILL stuck in customs lol, ordered the gat oil kings like 3 weeks ago. suffering over here. building's gonna have to wait til they clear 😩
staging build is deployed 👍 pushed the new checkout flow + the form validation fixes. review whenever you get a sec, no rush. lmk if anything looks off
hey re-merged the bot PR, the webhook race condition is gone now. thanks for the review again man, you caught that mutex thing I would've never seen. owe you a beer at meetup
so Pixel just yeeted Boba's cone clean off and now they're both zooming around the apartment. absolute chaos. Boba's stitches are FINE I checked but I am not okay
ok who's down for a build hangout Saturday? thinking my place ~2pm, I'll have the soldering station + lube supplies out. bring your kits. who's in??
SWITCHES ARE HERE 🎉🎉 customs finally let them go. building ALL weekend, clearing my whole calendar. send help and snacks
switches finally landed so I'm bringing the full build to the meetup Tues, gonna do the sound test live. you still good to demo the firmware flash thing? would pair nicely
dropped a quick sound test clip in #builds 🎧 tape mod + foam + the new switches. thocc level is unreal imo but tell me I'm not biased lol. thoughts??
build is DONE. fully assembled, every key tested, zero chatter. it's 1:30am and I am completely dead but 100% worth it. gn nerds
Morning! Quick heads up — client moved the timeline up, they want prod live by Friday. I know it's tight, sorry. Can you make it work? Anything you need from me?
yeah I can hit Friday, no worries. pushing the prod config tonight after I finish QA on staging. will ping you once it's deployed so you can do a final walkthrough
ugh I think I leaked a key — committed the .env to the shared Drive doc by accident, an old API token was in it. rotating now and scrubbing history. classic me. don't tell anyone lol 🙃
prod is live ✅ verified the whole flow end to end, payments + emails all firing correctly. sorry for the scramble this week, appreciate you being flexible on the doc cleanup
officially recovered from prod-deploy crunch week, my soul has returned to my body. who's hitting the brewery later? thinking Pinthouse around 6, need a beer like you wouldn't believe
finally got a proper glamour shot of the finished board 📸✨ natural light, the whole vibe. and of course Pixel photobombed the corner of frame, little gremlin. but honestly it completes it
finally finished lubing the whole board last night — Gateron Ink Blacks, filmed, foam mod, the works. she's BUTTERY. somebody please validate my 4am life choices 😂 pics incoming
Post-launch triage list is up on the board — sorted the 3 cart bugs as P1, the rest are cosmetic. I'll knock out the P1s tomorrow AM. Lmk if anything else surfaced on your end overnight.

man i can't sleep, still spiraling over that key i leaked last week. like i TEACH people not to do this and then i hardcode a token in a public repo lol. some senior dev i am. dunno why i'm telling you this at 2am but you get it
Boba got the cone off, healing perfect 🥹 he's already back to knocking pens off my desk so we're 100% recovered
hey thanks for all the kind words during Boba's vet stuff this week, you all are the best. genuinely cheered me up. drinks on me at the next meet 🍻
webhook fixed, pushed — and yes I rotated the key 😅 lesson learned the hard way. new one's in the vault this time, not the repo. promise.
random q — what are you running for reverse proxy these days? still on nginx or did you switch to caddy? trying to clean up my homelab setup

ok so since we're talking homelab — i've got the printer + NAS + two pis on the main vlan, pihole doing dns, router port-forwarded for the jellyfin box... yeah i know i know it's a mess. one of these days i'll segment it properly lol
Quick one — should I send the next invoice end of this week or roll it into next month's with the new tickets? whatever's easier for your accounting.
got tailscale working, this is so clean. killed all my port forwards, magic dns just works. why did i wait this long honestly
That CSS alignment fix is deployed — checked it on mobile + desktop, looks good. should be the last of the cosmetic list.
who's down for a meetup next week? thinking we grab a corner at Pinthouse or maybe Zilker Brewing this time — bring your latest builds, i wanna see what everyone's been cooking 👀
yo @everyone the GMK group buy closes TONIGHT 11:59 — who's still on the fence?? I already caved lol. $300 keycaps incoming, do not tell my budget
[img: pi5_nvme_rack.jpg] finally cable-managed the homelab lol 😤 Pi 5 + NVMe hat, all velcro'd down. took me 3hrs but worth it. Boba sat on the keyboard the whole time tho
can't believe i just dropped $300 on keycaps and my password is still literally pixel1993 don't @ me 😂 yes i know yes i know i'll fix it (i won't)
pushed the CSS spacing fix — prod looks good now, padding's consistent across the cards. lmk if you spot anything else. (also ignore the test key in the shared doc, gonna clean that up)
note to self: actually rotate the API keys this time... again 🙃 pretty sure i left one in a dotfile commit last month too. future me's problem

ok next homelab idea brewing: proper NAS build, like 4-bay, ZFS, the works. gonna name the host after my old street again for old times sake lmao. boba & pixel get their own dataset obviously. it's 1:30am why am i like this
